title: melica nutans subsp. uniflora
intro: Melica nutans subsp. uniflora, also known as wood melick or wood melick grass, is a plant species within the genus Melica that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Melica nutans subsp. uniflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
